text: fix explanation saving in graph sidebar

reflections.context: Explanation field typed in the graph sidebar connection editor appeared to save (optimistic update worked) but was lost on reload.
reflections.outcome: Found that the backend aim.update mutation explicitly reconstructed each supportingConnection object with only aimId, relativePosition, and weight — silently dropping explanation. Added explanation to the spread. Added a backend integration test that round-trips explanation through update and re-read.
reflections.effectiveness: One-line fix, root cause was immediately visible from reading the mapping code. Frontend test already covered the blur/race case; only the persistence layer was missing coverage.
reflections.lesson: Explicit field reconstruction (mapping to a new object) is dangerous — it silently drops any fields not listed. Either spread the original object first and override specific fields, or list all fields explicitly with a type check.

status.comment: Backend was reconstructing supportingConnections without the explanation field — now preserved.
